testcase.name: test_regression_champion_pending_flow_unchanged
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter231_open_challenge.py:276: in test_regression_champion_pending_flow_unchanged assert r.status_code == 200, f"champion challenge failed: {r.status_code} {r.text[:300]}" E AssertionError: champion challenge failed: 409 {"detail":"Un défi ouvert existe déjà avec ce champion."} E assert 409 == 200 E + where 409 = <Response [409]>.status_code
